title: Provider Options Seam Deepening
problem: The llm_dart_provider provider_options module owns JSON bag transport, typed invocation options, prompt-part options, tool options, replay options, resolver helpers, and bag JSON internals in one shallow implementation module.

evidence.summary: Provider option symbols were classified into bag transport, typed invocation, prompt-part replay, tool options, and internal JSON support before implementation split work started.
ProviderOptionsBag and JSON bag validation, merge, freeze, equality, and hashing helpers moved into a focused bag transport part while preserving the public provider_options.dart facade.
Typed invocation contracts, bundle helpers, typed-to-bag projection, and model/invocation resolver helpers moved into a focused invocation options part.
Prompt-part, tool, and replay option contracts were split into focused parts; replay metadata extraction remains explicit and guard-covered.
Provider package analysis, provider package tests, workspace dependency guard, provider replay metadata guard, provider metadata namespace guard, replay guard unit test, and git diff --check passed.

evidence_notes: POS-010 audit completed and recorded in 01-provider-option-symbol-audit.md.
POS-020 through POS-040 completed as a facade-preserving part-file split.
POS-050 full gate set passed on 2026-05-23.

continue_policy.notes: Provider Options Seam Deepening is complete. Any future move from part files to separate importable libraries should be opened as a new lane because the current goal preserved the stable provider_options.dart public entrypoint.
